description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a dark, gabled roof and exterior walls clad in textured stone or brick. The front facade showcases large, floor-to-ceiling windows beneath the main gable, allowing ample natural light into the living space. A spacious wooden deck extends from the side, furnished with several lounge chairs, suggesting an area for outdoor relaxation. The rear and side elevations display a series of smaller, evenly spaced windows, providing light and ventilation to the interior rooms. The main entrance is subtly recessed under the roof overhang, offering shelter and architectural interest. The overall design is compact and functional, with a focus on horizontal lines and integration with outdoor living spaces.
description: A single-story stone-clad bungalow with a dark gabled roof, large front windows, and a wooden deck with lounge chairs.
description_view_0: Oblique view showing the wooden deck with lounge chairs, large sliding glass doors, and the main gabled roof.
description_view_1: Side elevation with a long stretch of stone wall and a row of small, evenly spaced windows.
description_view_2: Rear corner view highlighting a smaller window and the continuation of the stone facade and roof overhang.
description_view_3: Front view featuring large, floor-to-ceiling windows under the main gable and the full width of the wooden deck.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front windows and grouped side windows
